title: phaseolus vulgaris var. lipurus
intro: Phaseolus vulgaris var. lipurus, also known as the 'narrow-leaved kidney bean' or 'common bean', is a variety of the common bean plant. This plant is believed to have medicinal properties due to its high content of antioxidants, flavonoids, and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Phaseolus vulgaris var. lipurus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and regulate blood sugar levels. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or extracts, which can be used to support digestive health and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and stress.
